chapter_title.en: Chapter 96 – The safety of the Religion

text: سَلَامَةُ الدِّينِ وَ صِحَّةُ الْبَدَنِ خَيْرٌ مِنَ الْمَالِ وَ الْمَالُ زِينَةٌ مِنْ زِينَةِ الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةٌ .
مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ إِسْمَاعِيلَ عَنِ الْفَضْلِ بْنِ شَاذَانَ عَنْ حَمَّادٍ عَنْ رِبْعِيٍّ عَنِ الْفُضَيْلِ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) مِثْلَهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, from Hammad Bin Isa, from Rabie Bin Abdullah, from Fuzayl Bin Yasaar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Safety of the Religion and good health of the body is better than the wealth, and the wealth is an adornment from the adornments of the world, an excellence’.
Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazl Bin Shazaan, from Hammad, from Rabie, from Al Fuzayl, from Abu Ja’farasws – similar to it.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali has narrated from his father from Hammad ibn ‘Isa from Rib’i ibn ‘Abd Allah from Fudayl ibn Yasar from abu Ja’far (a.s.) who has said the following: “Soundness of religion and good health is better than property. Property is a beauty of the worldly beauties and it is a good thing.” Muhammad ibn Isma’il has narrated from Fadl ibn Shadhan from Hammad from Rib’i from al-Fudayl from abu Ja’far (a.s.) a similar Hadith.
